title: Investigation: Propel (GB)
text:
Subject: Propel (GB)

Investigated for: The late reporting of two non-cash donations

Decision: No determination of offence made

Summary of reasons: We decided to close the investigation on the basis that it was not proportionate to continue, as this was a particularly complex and nuanced matter for the Party which could not be easily addressed by our published advice and guidance. We considered these facts and made no determination of any offences as the public register of donations was brought up to date and transparency was upheld for voters.
